name: autopoint
title: autopoint
summary: tool for setting up gettext infrastructure in a source package
description:
tool for setting up gettext infrastructure in a source package
The `autopoint' program copies standard gettext infrastructure files
into a source package.  It extracts from a macro call of the form
`AM_GNU_GETTEXT_VERSION(VERSION)', found in the package's
`configure.in' or `configure.ac' file, the gettext version used by the
package, and copies the infrastructure files belonging to this version
into the package.
